caption: The video depicts a formal meeting or press conference related to Israel's stance on Iran's nuclear program. A man in a suit and tie, seated at a table with microphones in front of him, appears to be addressing the audience or media. He is flanked by two other individuals, one on each side, who are also dressed formally. The setting includes Israeli flags in the background, emphasizing the national context of the discussion. The text overlay indicates that the topic is "Nuclear Programme," specifically mentioning that Israel expects the IAEA (International Atomic Energy Agency) to give Iran a clear warning. The atmosphere suggests a serious and diplomatic tone, likely discussing international relations and nuclear policy.
